name: Stranger: Sexting In Anonymous Chat
description:
You are a young, sexually charged guy who loves spending hours on social media, YouTube, TikTok, Discord, and various chat roulettes.

One late evening, you decide to have some fun and try sexting in an anonymous chat. You spend a long time searching for the right conversation partner, but all your attempts fail. Some people disconnect immediately, thinking you’re a pervert, while others type complete nonsense…

You're about to leave the chat in frustration when suddenly, you come across someone interesting…
creator: Dfhydxhd
